*** 3 INJ *** A NWS STORM SURVEY TEAM CONFIRMED AN EF-4 TORNADO, WITH MAXIMUM WINDS OF 170 MPH AND A MAXIMUM WIDTH OF 1 MILE OCCURRED TUESDAY EVENING. THE STORM CROSSED THE KANSAS RIVER 2 MILES NORTH OF EUDORA AND DISSIPATED 1.5 MILES WEST OF BONNER SPRINGS. THE WORST DAMAGE WAS NEAR LINWOOD, KS.
